---
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Arial"
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry: "top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm, left=2.5cm, right=2.5cm"
    papersize: letter
    linestretch: 1.15
    colorlinks: true
    urlcolor: blue
    title-block-style: none
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
---

```{=latex}
\begin{flushright}
Luis E. Mart\'{i}nez-Rodr\'{i}guez, Ph.D.\\
Boston, MA\\
luised94@mit.edu\\
\href{https://linkedin.com/in/luis-martinez-1394b619a}{linkedin.com/in/luis-martinez-1394b619a}\\[1em]
\today
\end{flushright}

\vspace{1em}

\noindent Dear Hiring Committee,

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent [OPENING PARAGRAPH]

\noindent [BODY PARAGRAPH 1]

\noindent [BODY PARAGRAPH 2]

\noindent [BODY PARAGRAPH 3 - GAPS/FIT]

\noindent [CLOSING PARAGRAPH]

\vspace{1.5em}

\noindent Sincerely,\\[0.5em]
\noindent Luis E. Mart\'{i}nez-Rodr\'{i}guez, Ph.D.
